name: How do I prove my fall at work was real if no one saw in South Salt Lake?

mainEntity.name: How do I prove my fall at work was real if no one saw in South Salt Lake?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medical docs, photos, prompt report for credibility.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Medical records, photos, timestamps, consistent story; report immediately.[2] No witnesses? Doctor notes and prior complaints help credibility.[2] Key factors: follow-up care; no gaps in reporting. File with Labor Commission if needed.[2] Attorney subpoenas evidence.

description: Medical docs, photos, prompt report for credibility.[2]
